findings.detail: Loop reads as a loop: SCORE -> TEMP forks into two visually parallel temperature panels (Low 0.2 / Sharp, High 1.5 / Flat) that re-merge at DRAW -> APPEND, with a clean 'repeat until stop signal' back-edge from APPEND to SCORE along the bottom. No overlaps, no truncation, no illegible crossings; panels are identically sized and styled.

All six node labels trace directly to corpus Implementation steps 1-5 and section 5.5; panel percentages (chai 93%/tea 5%/soup <1% vs chai 44%/tea 24%/soup 5%) match the corpus temperature table exactly. Title 'Temperature: the knob on the lottery' lives in the config title field, matching section 5.5's heading.

Soft note only: 11px italic subtitles render small but remain legible at the 1300px render width; the denser percentage strings inside SHARP/FLAT are the tightest. Optional polish: raise to 12px. Not verdict-blocking.

preflight.title_discipline: pass (governing concept in title:, no ghost node)
preflight.single_path: n/a (intent explicitly calls for fork/merge contrast panels)
